name: Finding the Pitch
description: Can't quite land on a note? That's normal. Slide your voice up or down until you hit the target zone.

feedback.intro: Start low and slide your voice upward — like a siren. When you cross through the green zone, try to lock in.
feedback.waiting: Start with a low hum and slide up...
feedback.complete: You connected your voice to the target pitch. That sliding-and-locking skill is how pitch matching actually works.
feedback.tip: Most people who think they're tone-deaf actually have a motor mapping issue, not a hearing one. This exercise builds that map.
